title: Daily Memo: On US Weapons Supplies
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Replenishing stocks. The Pentagon is reportedly planning to request funds from Congress to replenish munitions used against Iran. Missiles for the Patriot and THAAD air defense systems will be prioritized, as well as Tomahawk cruise missiles. This comes as the Trump administration has been increasing pressure since early 2025 on defense contractors to ramp up […]

The post Daily Memo: On US Weapons Supplies appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
Replenishing stocks. The Pentagon is reportedly planning to request funds from Congress to replenish munitions used against Iran. Missiles for the Patriot and THAAD air defense systems will be prioritized, as well as Tomahawk cruise missiles. This comes as the Trump administration has been increasing pressure since early 2025 on defense contractors to ramp up […]
